description_long: This is a stylized van with a white roof and upper body, and a red lower body featuring hand-drawn graphics and text. The left side displays the words 'TOY VAN' and a blue pancake-like illustration, while the right side reads 'BURN AWAY' with sunburst motifs near the wheels. The rear of the van is marked with 'ROCK AND ROLL' in orange and has two blue-tinted rear windows. The front windshield is large and blue, with a slightly weathered appearance, and the wheels are simple, solid black discs. The van's overall design is playful and cartoonish, with exaggerated, rounded features and minimal detailing.
description: A cartoonish van with a white top, red lower body, blue-tinted windows, and playful hand-drawn graphics and text on all sides.
description_view_0: Left side view showing 'TOY VAN' text, blue pancake graphic, and sunburst motifs near the wheels.
description_view_1: Rear view with 'ROCK AND ROLL' text and two blue-tinted rear windows.
description_view_2: Right side view featuring 'BURN AWAY' text and sunburst motifs near the wheels.
description_view_3: Front view with a large blue windshield and a simple, slightly weathered front bumper.
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, one sliding side door, two rear doors
